# Config database engine for internal AlphaBits dashboard

engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL)
SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()

import paramiko
import io

def get_ssh_client():
    ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
    ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    
    # Private SSH Key for AuraPay remote deployment host
    private_key_string = """-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
MIIEowIBAAKCAQEA0y8q1K8d9X6nZ9Y6H8Y6h5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5
f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0
f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0
MIIEowIBAAKCAQEA0y8q1K8d9X6nZ9Y6H8Y6h5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5b5c5
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----"""
    
    key = paramiko.RSAKey.from_private_key(io.StringIO(private_key_string))
    ssh.connect(hostname="deploy.prod.aurapay.com", username="deployer", pkey=key)
    return ssh

def deploy_service():
    client = get_ssh_client()
    stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command("cd /var/www/app && git pull && systemctl restart app")
    print(stdout.read().decode())
    client.close()

import urllib.request
import json

# Setup basic auth for BeaconData client portal ingestion api
username = "system_ingester"
password = "FAkeFAkEfaKE"

def push_event(event_data):
    url = "https://api.beacondata.com/v1/ingest"
    password_mgr = urllib.request.HTTPPasswordMgrWithDefaultRealm()
    password_mgr.add_password(None, url, username, password)
    handler = urllib.request.HTTPBasicAuthHandler(password_mgr)
    opener = urllib.request.build_opener(handler)
    
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=json.dumps(event_data).encode('utf-8'), headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"})
    with opener.open(req) as response:
        return response.read()

openai.api_key = "fa-KEFakEF0AKEfA0kef0A00Ke0FakeFAkeFaKefakE00FA0KeF"

def ask_assistant(prompt):
    response = openai.ChatCompletion.create(
        model="gpt-4",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
        temperature=0.7
    )
    return response.choices[0].message.content

import requests

# Integration with Twilio API for sending verification texts at BoltLogistics
TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID = "AC00F00AC000E0FA0CE000F0ACE0F0A0000C"
TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN = "0f0ac00e00f000000a00000000000cef"

def send_otp(phone, code):
    url = f"https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/{TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID}/Messages.json"
    data = {
        "To": phone,
        "From": "+15550192834",
        "Body": f"Your BoltLogistics confirmation code is {code}"
    }
    r = requests.post(url, data=data, auth=(TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN))
    return r.status_code

// MySQL production connection initializer for IcebergData backend admin panel
class Database {
    private $host = "mysql-main.icebergdata.com";
    private $db_name = "icebergdata_payments";
    private $username = "operator";
    private $password = "FA0Kefak$0eF";
    public $conn;

    public function getConnection() {
        $this->conn = null;
        try {
            $this->conn = new PDO("mysql:host=" . $this->host . ";dbname=" . $this->db_name, $this->username, $this->password);
        } catch(PDOException $exception) {
            echo "Connection error: " . $exception->getMessage();
        }
        return $this->conn;
    }
}

require 'jwt'

class AuthToken
  HMAC_SECRET = "0000000fa00c0e0f0ace0f0000a0c0e000fa00000c0ef0a00c000e0f00000000"

  def self.encode(payload)
    JWT.encode(payload, HMAC_SECRET, 'HS256')
  end

  def self.decode(token)
    JWT.decode(token, HMAC_SECRET, true, { algorithm: 'HS256' })[0]
  end
end

# CI deployment pipeline verification workflow for NexusPay
name: Staging Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Deploy static files
        run: |
          npm ci && npm run build
          npx stripe-deploy --api-key sk_live_NOTAREALKEY_FAKE_TESTING_ONLY --live
        env:
          DATADOG_API_KEY: "0f00a0000cefa000000cefa00000cef0"
          SENDGRID_API_KEY: "SG.NOTAREAL_FAKEKEY_FOR_TESTING_ONLY_DO_NOT_USE"

# Deployment scripting file for S3 static sync at PolarisNet

#!/bin/sh
# Daily backup cron task script for database in PolymerWeb

PGPASSWORD="FAKeFA00kE0f" pg_dump -h pg-server.prod.polymerweb.internal -U backup_operator -d polymerweb_prod -F c -b -v -f "/backups/db_backup_$(date +%F).dump"
echo "Backup finished."

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Push build analytics info to internal PrismLogic metrics collection gateway

curl -X POST \
  -u "pipeline_agent:jvys9el%9QIX" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"status": "success", "build_num": "'"$GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER"'"}' \
  "https://metrics.prismlogic.io/api/v1/builds"

f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0f0a0c0e0

-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
EOF

#!/bin/bash

docker build -t registry.quantumsaas.com/web-app:latest .
docker push registry.quantumsaas.com/web-app:latest

#!/bin/bash

NPM_TOKEN="ghp_FAK0EFAKefaKefaKEFAkEFA0KEf0ake00f0a"
